ogTitle: Hoyleton vs Humbug Scrub: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hoyleton and Humbug Scrub.
heading: Hoyleton vs Humbug Scrub — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hoyleton, South Australia and Humbug Scrub, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Humbug Scrub has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hoyleton (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hoyleton or Humbug Scrub safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hoyleton has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Humbug Scrub scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hoyleton scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Humbug Scrub scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hoyleton or Humbug Scrub?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Humbug Scrub has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
